auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to access the MediSync platform
auth.register_subtitle: Join MediSync to manage your clinical practice

home.hero_title:
Your patients,
your practice,
in one place.
home.hero_subtitle: CortiSense brings together scheduling, records, and reporting into a single clinical workspace.
home.feature_1_desc: Access complete patient histories, labs, and notes from a single timeline.
home.feature_2_desc: Manage appointments with intelligent conflict detection and reminders.
home.feature_3_desc: Generate SOAP notes, referral letters, and analytics with one click.

deviceManagement.title: Device Management
deviceManagement.doctorDescription: Link your medical device and review its synchronization status during your shift.
deviceManagement.adminDescription: Review connected devices and manage synchronization status across medical staff.
deviceManagement.linkDeviceDescription: Register a wearable device for biometric tracking.
deviceManagement.syncStatusDescription: Current synchronization status of linked devices.

biometricMonitoring.title: Biometric Monitoring
biometricMonitoring.doctorDescription: Review your latest biometric indicators and historical records.
biometricMonitoring.adminDescription: Review biometric records from medical staff and update monitoring data.
biometricMonitoring.latestRecordDescription: This record contains your latest sleep, heart rate and activity information.
biometricMonitoring.noRecordsDescription: Your biometric records will appear when a connected device sends monitoring data.
biometricMonitoring.myHistoryDescription: Previous biometric records collected from your connected device.
biometricMonitoring.generalRecordsDescription: Generate new biometric records for currently connected devices.
biometricMonitoring.medicalStaffHistoryDescription: General biometric records grouped by medical staff, date, heart rate, sleep and activity.

login.biometric: Biometric monitoring and intelligent shift management to prevent medical burnout.

register.brand_subtitle: Join a platform designed to monitor wellness and optimize performance for medical professionals.
register.subtitle: Start monitoring your health and shifts today.

errors.unauthorized_desc: You don't have permission to view this page.
